sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92808" key="r(u/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n92808.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐρύω</ref> </xr> (B). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥύπα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, heterocl. pl. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥύπος</foreign> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
